title: Expanding Search Bar

statement.markdown:
text: ### Requirements
1. Create a search bar that expands when clicked on the input field.
2. The expanded search bar should have a max-width of 800px and a min-width of 200px.
3. The search bar should have a default height of 40px and a transition effect for the height when expanding or shrinking.
4. The search bar should have a placeholder text that changes to a different text when it gains focus.
5. The search bar should have a button next to it that expands the search bar when clicked.
6. The button should have a background color of #333 and a hover effect that changes its background color to #555.
7. The search bar and the button should be centered horizontally in the page.
type: text/markdown

constraints: The search bar should be expandable up to 800px wide.
The search bar should be shrinkable to 40px high.
The search bar should change its placeholder text when it gains focus.
The button should have a hover effect that changes its background color.
The search bar and the button should be centered horizontally in the page.
